## Requested Change

Describe the proposed change.

## Reason

Explain why the change is needed.

## Affected Areas

- [ ] Scope
- [ ] Timeline
- [ ] Cost
- [ ] Risk
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] User experience
- [ ] Documentation

## Impact Assessment

Describe expected effort, risks, dependencies, and trade-offs.

## Recommendation

Approve / Reject / Defer
